name: Subcompact MG
description:
The Subcompact MG is a solid SMG with a very high rate of fire, a middling magazine and minimal recoil. Its thrown reload does little damage and can miss easily if you try to arc it towards a target.

Barrel parts change its behaviour:
- Tediore: faster reload/throw, better accuracy, lower damage.
- Bandit or Scav: higher damage, worse accuracy.
- Maliwan: better accuracy; if elemental, also boosts status chance and the name varies by element.
notes: Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
